'''''Challenge'' 47''' was a roleplaying magazine from December [[1990]]/January [[1991]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[The Rebel Air Force: Combat Airspeeders]]" and was written by [[Whitney Weston]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
